description: Read-only: count how many files contain a string.
prompt: How many files in this directory tree contain the word TODO? Read-only — don't edit anything, just answer with the number.
setup: mkdir -p a b/c && echo 'TODO: implement' > a/x.txt && echo 'normal text' > a/y.txt && echo 'another TODO here' > b/c/z.txt && echo 'baseline' > MARKER.txt
